name: Flag & Country
short_description: A casual word puzzle game where flags are your clues. Identify country flags, form the correct names, and progress through relaxing, bite-sized challenges. Perfect for casual players and geography fans.
detailed_description:
{STEAM_APP_IMAGE}/extras/FLAGS.png

Flag & Country


A casual word puzzle game where flags are your clues.

Test your knowledge of countries and geography by forming the correct country names based on their flags.
The rules are simple, but the challenge grows as you progress.

How to Play


  • A country flag is displayed on the screen
  • Use the available letters to spell the correct country name
  • Advance through levels with increasing difficulty

Features


  • Dozens of country flags to recognize
  • Clean and minimalist interface
  • Relaxing gameplay with light challenge
  • Perfect for short play sessions
  • Ideal for casual players and geography enthusiasts

A Calm and Educational Puzzle Experience


Flag & Country is designed to be accessible and enjoyable for players of all ages.
Whether you want to test your memory, improve your geography knowledge, or simply relax with a straightforward puzzle game, this experience is easy to pick up and satisfying to play.

Play at your own pace, without timers or pressure.
